Settings
Business Information
Used in email signatures, invoice headers, booking widget footers, and patient communications. Update once, applies everywhere.
Business Logo
Appears on invoices, email templates, and booking widget defaults. PNG, JPG, or SVG. 2MB max.
No logo
Business Schedule
Your timezone, weekly hours, and blackout dates. Controls calendar display, booking availability, and patient-facing scheduling.
Timezone

Blackout Dates
Block bookings on holidays or other closed days. Applies to all booking widgets.
